title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Domeniul Public și Privat SA (3,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 3,000 on Domeniul Public și Privat SA. The controller used Bodycams to verify compliance with occupational health and safety rules. The controller failed to adequately inform employees regarding the processing, which the DPA deemed excessive. Legal bas...
